prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Single-conformation model re-refinement of 2F/S3-rich PSII intermediate structure at 2.09 Angstrom resolution. Entity description: Cytochrome b559 subunit alpha. Entry keywords: PHOTOSYNTHESIS Model bias Model anti-bias single-conformation model refinement CaMn4O5 composition, PHOTOSYNTHESIS. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.452381; mean_interface=0.292889; max_segment_membrane_density=0.708995; mean_disorder=0.154555. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
V68 E65 cofactor sentinel source. cofactor_context ligand_context cofactor-stabilized soluble core; components: CLA HEC. Not assembly_required_core and no explicit transmembrane topology evidence.
